title: 2025 AMC 12A Problems/Problem 21
problem: There is a unique ordered triple $(a,k,m)$ of nonnegative integers such that \[\frac{4^a + 4^{a+k}+4^{a+2k}+\cdots + 4^{a+mk}}{2^a + 2^{a+k} + 2^{a+2k}+ \cdots + 2^{a+mk}} = 964.\] What is $a+k+m$ ? $\textbf{(A) } 8 \qquad \textbf{(B) } 9 \qquad \textbf{(C)} 10 \qquad \textbf{(D) } 11 \qquad \textbf{(E) } 12$
